description: Composition Charcoal grey T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves, graphic print on the chest and brand badge above the left hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 40 degrees using a mild detergent Do not dry clean or bleach Tumble dry low and dry inside-out in shade Warm iron Celebrate the spirit and power of the eagle with this T-shirt from facit. Oozing high energy, this T-shirt has been crafted from soft, premium cotton fabric to offer exemplary comfort. Team it with jeans and sneakers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
